title: Turkish Pasta Fritters
description: Crispy fried pasta snacks with a Turkish twist. This recipe is perfect as a quick snack or side dish.
instructions: 1. Cook pasta according to package instructions until al dente.
2. Drain and set aside to cool.
3. In a bowl, mix together cooled pasta, Turkish seasoning, salt, and black pepper.
4. Using your hands, shape the pasta mixture into small patties.
5. Heat the deep-frying oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
6. When the oil is hot, add the pasta patties and fry until golden brown, about 2-3 minutes per side.
7. Remove the fritters from the oil with a slotted spoon and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
8. If desired, sprinkle with Parmesan cheese.
